urdu transliteration text:
Muhamad Kay Gharanay Se Wafadari Karenge Hum
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: We Will Show Our Loyalty To The Family Of Muhammad (Pbuh).

urdu transliteration text:
Azakhane Sajaein Ge Azadari Karenge Hum
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: We Will Decorate Our Centres (In Black Cloth) And We Will Do Azadari.

urdu transliteration text:
Sharaf humne yeh paya hai dua e Fatima hain hum
To jab tak jan baaqi hai karenge shah ka matam
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: We have attained the honour of being the du’a of Bibi Fatima. For as long as we live, we will mourn Hussain.

urdu transliteration text:
Janab E Sayyada Se Yoon Namakhari Karenge Hum
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: We Will Show Our Loyalty To Bibi Fatima In This Way

urdu transliteration text:
Bicha kar farsh e matam hum nay duniya ko bataya hai
Yeh izzat or yeh daulat shah e wala ka sadqa hai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: We Have Showed The World Through Our Mourning. All This Wealth And Respect Is Through Hussain Only.

urdu transliteration text:
Fida dolat inhi kay naam per sari karenge hum
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: We Will Sacrifice All Our Wealth In Hussain’s Name

urdu transliteration text:
Julooso me jari abbas ka parcham uthaein ge
Waha(n’) naam e sakina par sabeelein bhi lagayein ge
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: We will carry the flag of Abbas in our processions. We will give out water in the name of Sakina.

urdu transliteration text:
Mukamal Mah E Ghum Ki Aise Tayari Karenge Hum
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: We Will Prepare For The Days Of Mourning In This Way

urdu transliteration text:
Jo zehra se kiya hum nay wohi wada nibhaein ge
Jahan jayein ge ghazi ka wahan parcham lagayein ge
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: We Will Try And Fulfil The Promise Made To Zahra. Wherever We Go We Will Carry The Flag Of Abbas.

urdu transliteration text:
Hussaini qaflay ki ab alamdari karenge hum
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: We Will Carry This Flag In Our Hussaini Processions

urdu transliteration text:
Sabhi bhai, bhateeje, bhanjay maray gaye piyase
Bas ik hi roz me haaye sitam lakhon sahay jis nay
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: All of Hussain’s brothers and nephews were killed thirsty. The one who endured countless oppression on one day.

urdu transliteration text:
Hussain Ibn E Ali Pe Girya O Zaari Karenge Hum
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto

Azadari kay sadqay me humein maula bulaein ge
Sakina ka dar e shabeer py nauha sunaein ge
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: He will call us to perform azadari at his shrine. We will recite a eulogy for Sakina at his shrine.

urdu transliteration text:
Yaqeenan Roza E Sarwar Ki Zawari Karenge Hum
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: We Will No Doubt Visit His Shrine!

urdu transliteration text:
Yeh ghum to arsalan e ghumzada wirsay me paya hai
Humein abbas nauha maa nay lori me sunaya hai
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: Arsalan, heavy heartedly says, we were taught to mourn for Hussain by our parents. Abbas (Karim), my mother recited nohas as lullabies to me.

urdu transliteration text:
Yeh Wirsa Apni Naslon Me Yun Hi Jaari Karenge Hum
Marshia Translations | ISIJ of Toronto
english translation text: We Will No Doubt Pass This Down Through Our Generations.
